note: seq=87: GUARDIAN restore + traceback diagnostic. seq-83/84 regressed the guardian by cutting TimeoutStartSec 240->50->120; the busier box (dozens more units + enrich load) makes the thorough --once pass exceed 120s -> SIGKILL before publish -> dark feed. This RESTORES the original working service (TimeoutStartSec=240 + StandardOutput/Error->/var/log/atlas/guardian.log, ExecStart meta_guardian.py --once) at a sane 90s cadence so monitoring publishes again, AND runs atlas_guardian_debug.py (--no-block) which executes --once capturing stdout+stderr+exit+duration to status/hetzner/guardian-debug.json so we see the REAL reason (timeout vs crash). If timeout, 240s already fixes it; if crash, stderr_tail shows the traceback to fix v2.

steps.note: seq=87: restore guardian @240s timeout + logging (90s cadence) + traceback diagnostic -> guardian-debug.json.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_guardian_debug.py':'a30fd1580d93a190f728747f8543a1098e6a2c1e0d0a2b4128e7577862f477d6'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('debug sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Meta Guardian (restored: 240s timeout + logging)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=5
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStartPre=/bin/sh -c 'mkdir -p /var/log/atlas'
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/guardian/meta_guardian.py --once
TimeoutStartSec=240
StandardOutput=append:/var/log/atlas/guardian.log
StandardError=append:/var/log/atlas/guardian.log

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Meta Guardian timer (90s cadence)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=20s
OnUnitActiveSec=90s
AccuracySec=10s
Unit=atlas-guardian.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS guardian traceback diagnostic
After=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_guardian_debug.py
TimeoutStartSec=260

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-guardian.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','restart','atlas-guardian.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-guardian.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-guardian.service']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-guardian-debug.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-guardian-debug.service']); print('guardian restored @240s + debug capturing')"
